title: Senior Financial Analyst - Piramal Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Piramal Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Piramal Finance:
Piramal Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance!
